memory.summary: The term project is due Thursday and I'm barely started, so skipping this leisure time to tackle the chore now feels like a necessary distraction.
That tiny chore ticked the box, but I'm still avoiding the real work. With my focus fading, I need to stop this procrastination loop immediately.
I told my friends progress is steady, but I'm still avoiding the real project work. My stress dropped slightly, yet I haven't actually started the term assignment.

desires: Get the quick chore done immediately to secure a dopamine hit and stop the guilt spiral before my energy hits zero.
Avoid starting the term project right now because it feels too hard and risks making me look incompetent if I fail mid-stream.
Collapse into bed or sleep to erase the exhaustion, even though I know it will make tomorrow worse.
Hide from my teammates and professor by staying invisible until the deadline is dangerously close.

goals.description: Force finish the 'Trivial easy chore' to 100% completion immediately.
goals.rationale: I am at 40%. My impulsive need for an instant dopamine hit and a closed loop is overwhelming right now. Finishing this small task will provide the only sense of accomplishment I can tolerate before my energy crashes. It's better than starting the term project which feels too big.

goals.description: Go to bed immediately after finishing the chore to escape current stress.
goals.rationale: My sleep discipline is low (3) and I have a sleep debt. Once the trivial win is secured, my avoidant side will scream for me to hide from the world. Sleeping erases the anxiety of the unfinished term project for tonight, even if it ruins tomorrow.

goals.description: Send a vague text to 'teammate_A' claiming I'm making steady progress on the group work.
goals.rationale: Only do this if I feel paranoid about them messaging me while I'm sleeping. If not, avoiding contact entirely is easier. The social friction isn't worth the effort right now compared to the immediate relief of sleep.

agent.last_reasoning: Advances 'g7_new_rev' to secure the instant dopamine hit of 100% completion. This short-term achievement satisfies my impulsive need for closure and allows me to immediately execute 'g9_sleep_escape', avoiding the stress of the term project.

goals.description: Immediately complete the trivial easy chore to secure a quick dopamine hit and feel productive before tackling the term project.
goals.rationale: My impulsive nature craves instant gratification, and my achievement drive needs a visible 'win' right now to justify starting the hard work. It's a short-term fix that boosts my mood without requiring deep planning.

goals.description: Begin working on the term project immediately after the chore, ignoring the leisure option to avoid future conflict with teammates or professor.
goals.rationale: While I want to avoid conflict (avoidant trait), the task is still in the distant future (3 days away). My short planning horizon makes me hesitant to start heavy lifting when a relaxing option exists, so I'm deferring this until the immediate dopamine hit from the chore fades.

desires: Complete the trivial easy chore immediately to get a quick dopamine hit and feel like I've accomplished something before the term project looms larger.
